_meta.title: Pharmaceutical Company Pipeline Sizes and Focus Areas
source_urls: Company IR pages (roche.com, pfizer.com, novartis.com, etc.)
_meta.note: IMPORTANT: Pipeline sizes are approximate based on public disclosures. Actual counts vary significantly depending on inclusion criteria (Phase 1 only? All phases? Discovery programs? Partnered assets?). These numbers are intended for relative comparison and visualization, not precise benchmarking. Always verify against official company R&D day presentations for accuracy.
_meta.how_to_refresh: Check annual reports (10-K filings via SEC EDGAR), R&D day presentations, and company pipeline pages on IR websites. Corroborate with commercial databases like Evaluate Pharma, Citeline Pharma Intelligence, or GlobalData.

data.name: Roche/Genentech
data.notes: World's largest oncology portfolio. Leading ADC/bispecific franchise.

data.name: Pfizer
data.notes: BioNTech COVID mRNA partnership; expanded into mRNA platform. Seagen acquisition added ADC portfolio.

data.name: Novartis
data.notes: Kymriah (CAR-T) pioneer. Zolgensma (gene therapy). RadioDC platform emerging.

data.name: AstraZeneca
data.notes: Largest ADC pipeline after Daiichi Sankyo partnerships (Enhertu, Dato-DXd).

data.name: Merck & Co
data.notes: Pembrolizumab (Keytruda) is world's best-selling oncology drug. mRNA personalized cancer vaccines in Phase 3.

data.name: Johnson & Johnson
data.notes: Teclistamab bispecific for myeloma. Amivantamab bispecific for lung cancer.

data.name: Bristol-Myers Squibb
data.notes: Opdivo (nivolumab, PD-1) flagship. Abecma/Breyanzi CAR-T in hematology.

data.name: Eli Lilly
data.notes: Tirzepatide (GLP-1/GIP) is fastest-growing revenue drug globally.

data.name: Novo Nordisk
data.notes: Semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy) drove Novo's market cap to ~$600B in 2024.

data.name: Moderna
data.notes: Platform company: RSV mRNA vaccine approved 2024. Personalized cancer vaccines in Phase 3 with Merck.

data.name: BioNTech
data.notes: Beyond COVID: mRNA cancer vaccines, CAR-T, bispecifics in clinical development.

data.name: Alnylam
data.notes: Founded the GalNAc-siRNA platform. Multiple approved products. Expanding beyond liver.

data.name: Ionis Pharma
data.notes: Pioneer of antisense oligonucleotide platform. Multiple partnerships (AstraZeneca, Biogen).

data.name: Gilead Sciences
data.notes: Kite Pharma acquisition brought CAR-T portfolio. Seladelpar/bropirstatin in liver disease.

data.name: Regeneron
data.notes: Dupilumab co-commercialized with Sanofi. Eylea franchise. VelociSuite antibody discovery platform.

data.name: bluebird bio
data.notes: Lovo-cel (sickle cell) and Zynteglo (beta-thalassemia) approved. Commercial challenges persist.

data.name: CRISPR Therapeutics
data.notes: Casgevy (with Vertex) — first approved CRISPR therapy. Type 1 diabetes (VX-880 stem cell) in trials.

data.name: Academic/NIH
data.notes: ClinicalTrials.gov institutional sponsor count for academic medical centers + NIH IND programs. All modalities; typically Phase 0-2 proof-of-concept.
